info.title: SportStock API
info.description: Read-mostly API; auth for /me and orders.

post.description: Register a new user. Balance is always set to 0.

get.description: Get current user. Requires auth.

patch.description: Update current user. Only name, phone_number, email. No balance.

get.description: List all markets.

schema.title: Response List Markets Api Markets  Get

get.description: Get market state. No auth.
List assets for a market. No auth.

schema.title: Response List Market Assets Api Markets  Market Id  Assets Get

get.description: Get full market (assets, prices, state). No per-user positions.
List current user's positions in this market. Auth required.

schema.title: Response List My Positions Api Markets  Market Id  Positions Get

post.description:
Submit buy/sell orders. All positions must belong to current user.
Buys require user.balance >= total cost. Auth required.

get.description: Get all stocks with optional filtering. Public.
Get top gainers and losers by price change vs initial value. Public.
Get stocks sorted by total position quantity (volume proxy). Public.
Get stocks with positive price movement. Public.
Get stocks with negative price movement. Public.
Get a single stock by ID (asset_id). Public.
Get price history for a stock. Currently returns empty history (no time-series table yet). Public.
Get all leagues (markets). Public.

schema.title: Response List Leagues Api Leagues Get

get.description: Get a single league by ID (market_id). Public.
Get the authenticated user's portfolio. Auth required.
Get all positions for the authenticated user. Auth required.

Get position for a specific stock (stock_id can be numeric API id or asset_id string).
Returns 404 if user doesn't own the stock. Auth required.
List transactions for the authenticated user. Auth required.

post.description:
Create a buy/sell transaction by stock ID.
Resolves stock_id to your position and executes the order. Auth required.

get.description: Get a single transaction by ID. Auth required (own only).
Get bonus information (currently all zeros). Public.
Get wallet balances for a user. Auth required; may only request own wallet.

post.description: Purchase fan coins. Not implemented (dual-currency not in scope).

get.description: Get purchase history. Not implemented (dual-currency not in scope).

Search stocks and leagues by name or ticker/id.
type: stock, league, or all. leagueID: filter stocks by market. Public.

BonusInfo.title: BonusInfo
BonusInfo.description: Bonus information for purchases (currently all zeros).

MarketResponse.title: MarketResponse
MarketResponse.description: Full market; no per-user positions, only assets/prices/state.

MoverItem.title: MoverItem
MoverItem.description: Stock with change info for top-movers / on-the-rise / upset-alert.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Single order: positive delta_quantity = buy, negative = sell.

Position.title: Position
Position.description: User's position in a stock (computed from transactions).

Stock.title: Stock
Stock.description: Sports team/stock that users can trade. Maps from AssetModel + price.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Update self; only name, phone, email. No balance.

Wallet.title: Wallet
Wallet.description: User's wallet balances. tradingCredits maps to UserModel.balance.
